title: Blepharitis follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports blepharitis identity, watery or red eyes, gritty, burning, stinging, greasy, itchy, swollen or crusted eyelids, light sensitivity, eyelid observation, and clinician-documented eyelid-hygiene discussion.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Swollen Eyelid – 40
source.population: People with eyelid swelling, including stye, chalazion, blepharitis, allergy, infection, trauma, and lesion differentials, with telehealth exclusions.
source.setting: DHA-licensed telehealth services with face-to-face or specialist referral where indicated.
source.exclusions: Direct for selected Dubai telehealth stye, blepharitis, eyelid-feature, and referral documentation. Diagnosis, medicine choice, dose, treatment instruction, procedure, urgency conclusion, and fixed follow-up remain clinician responsibilities.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports blepharitis identity, watery or red eyes, gritty, burning, stinging, greasy, itchy, swollen or crusted eyelids, light sensitivity, eyelid observation, and clinician-documented eyelid-hygiene discussion.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-led referral, worsening, vision change, severe redness, severe pain, photophobia, spread, trauma, uncertain diagnosis, and refractory-symptom documentation without automatically concluding urgency.
